mapper.select: select id, name, title, university, major, location, email, bio, focus_areas, highlights from user_profile order by id asc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into user_profile (id, name, title, university, major, location, email, bio, focus_areas, highlights) values (#{id}, #{name}, #{title}, #{university}, #{major}, #{location}, #{email}, #{bio}, #{focusAreas}, #{highlights})
mapper.update: update user_profile set name = #{name}, title = #{title}, university = #{university}, major = #{major}, location = #{location}, email = #{email}, bio = #{bio}, focus_areas = #{focusAreas}, highlights = #{highlights} where id = #{id}
